ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tires" (
  "tire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tire */,
  "sizing" TEXT /* Complete tire sizing (e.g., 225/45R17 94V XL M+S FP FP) */,
  "rim_size" INTEGER /* Rim size of the tire */,
  "speed_index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speed index of the tire */,
  "load_index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the load index of the tire */,
  "sap_code" INTEGER /* SAP code for internal tracking */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the tire */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the inventory record of the tire */,
  "tread_depth" REAL /* Tread depth of the tire */,
  "tire_type" TEXT /* Type of the tire (e.g., all-season, summer, winter) */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency rating of the tire (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "wet_grip" TEXT /* Wet grip rating of the tire (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "noise_level" TEXT /* Noise level of the tire (e.g., 68 dB, 70 dB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tires_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tires_load_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("load_index_id") REFERENCES load_indices ("load_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tires_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tires_speed_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("speed_index_id") REFERENCES speed_indices ("speed_index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the supplier (e.g., 4.5/5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "tire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tire in the inventory */,
  "current_stock" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the tire */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the tire */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for restocking the tire */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock for the tire */,
  "min_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the tire */,
  "max_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum order quantity for the tire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program membership status */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* Purchase history of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "tire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tire in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the tire ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the tire */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the tire */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_tire_id FOREIGN KEY ("tire_id") REFERENCES tires ("tire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tire_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tire_feature_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature mapping */,
  "tire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tire */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tire_feature_map_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES tire_features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tire_feature_map_tire_id FOREIGN KEY ("tire_id") REFERENCES tires ("tire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speed_indices" (
  "speed_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed index */,
  "speed_code" TEXT /* Speed code (e.g., V, H) */,
  "max_speed" TEXT /* Maximum speed (e.g., <= 240 KM/H, <= 210 KM/H) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "load_indices" (
  "load_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each load index */,
  "load_code" INTEGER /* Load code (e.g., 94, 91) */,
  "max_load" TEXT /* Maximum load capacity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("load_index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_compatibility" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "tire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tire */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_compatibility_tire_id FOREIGN KEY ("tire_id") REFERENCES tires ("tire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, inventory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
